name: Healing Word
desc: Healing energy washes over the alvo and it regains pontos de vida equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier.
higher_level: The pontos de vida regained increase by 1d4 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Heart of Dis
desc:
You magically replace your heart with one forged on the second layer of Hell. While the spell lasts, you are immune to fear and can't be envenenado, and you are immune to fogo and dano de veneno. You gain resistance to dano de frio, as well as to contundente, perfurante, and dano cortante from não mágico weapons that aren't silvered. You have vantagem on teste de resistências against spells and other mágico effects. Finally, while you are conscious, any criatura hostile to you that starts its turn within 20 pés of you deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha no teste, the criatura is amedrontado of you until the start of your next turn. em um sucesso, the criatura is immune to the effect for 24 horas.

Casting this spell magically transports your mortal heart to the lair of one of the lords of Hell. The heart returns to your body when the spell ends. If you die while under the effects of this spell, you can't be brought back to life until your original heart is retrieved.

name: Heart to Heart
desc: For the duration, you and the criatura you touch remain stable and inconsciente if reduced to 0 pontos de vida while the other has 1 or more pontos de vida. If you touch a dying criatura, it becomes stable but remains inconsciente while it has 0 pontos de vida. If both of you are reduced to 0 pontos de vida, you must both make death teste de resistências, as normal. If you or the alvo regain pontos de vida, either of you can choose to split those pontos de vida between the two of you if both of you are within 60 pés of each other.
material: a drop of your blood

name: Heart-Seeking Arrow
desc: The next time you make a ataque à distância com arma during the spell's duration, the weapon's munição—or the weapon itself if it's a arremesso weapon—seeks its alvo's vital organs. Make the jogada de ataque as normal. On a hit, the weapon causa an extra 6d6 damage of the same type dealt by the weapon, or half as much damage on a miss as it streaks unerringly toward its alvo. If this attack reduces the alvo to 0 pontos de vida, the alvo has desvantagem on its next death teste de resistência, and, if it dies, it can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the extra damage on a hit increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Heartache
desc: You força an inimigo to experience pangs of unrequited love and emotional distress. These feelings manifest with such intensity that the criatura recebe 5d6 dano psíquico on a failed teste de resistência de Carisma, or half o dano em um sucesso no teste.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can alvo an additional inimigo for each slot level above 2nd.
material: a silver locket

name: Hearth Charm
desc: This spell makes flammable material burn twice as long as normal.

name: Heartstop
desc: You slow the beating of a willing alvo’s heart to the rate of one beat per minuto. The criatura’s breathing almost stops. To a casual or brief observer, the subject appears dead. no final de the spell, the criatura returns to normal with no ill effects.

name: Heartstrike
desc: The spirits of ancient archers carry your missiles straight to their alvos. You have vantagem on ranged weapon attacks until the start of your next turn, and you can ignore penalties for your inimigos having half cover or three-quarters cover, and for an area being lightly obscured, when making those attacks.
material: an arrow, bolt, or other missile

name: Heat Metal
desc: Escolha um objeto de metal manufaturado, como uma arma de metal ou uma armadura de metal pesada ou média, que você possa ver dentro do alcance. Você faz o objeto ficar incandescente. Qualquer criatura em contato físico com o objeto sofre 2d8 de dano de fogo quando você conjura a magia. Até que a magia termine, você pode usar uma ação bônus em cada um dos seus turnos subsequentes para causar esse dano novamente. Se uma criatura estiver segurando ou usando o objeto e sofrer o dano causado por ele, a criatura deve ser bem-sucedida em um teste de resistência de Constituição ou soltar o objeto, se puder. Se ela não soltar o objeto, terá desvantagem em jogadas de ataque e testes de habilidade até o início do seu próximo turno.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3º nível ou superior, o dano aumenta em 1d8 para cada nível de espaço acima do 2º.
material: Um pedaço de ferro e uma chama.

name: Heat Metal
desc: The alvo becomes oven hot. Any criatura touching the alvo recebe 2d8 dano de fogo when the spell is cast. Until the spell ends, on subsequent turns you can use a ação bônus to inflict the same damage. If a criatura is holding or wearing the alvo and suffers damage, it makes a teste de resistência de Constituição or it drops the alvo. If a criatura does not or cannot drop the alvo, it has desvantagem on attack rolls and ability checks until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Heavenly Crown
desc: A glowing, golden crown appears on your head and sheds dim leve in a 30-pé radius. When you cast the spell (and as a ação bônus on subsequent turns, until the spell ends), you can alvo one willing criatura within 30 pés of you that you can see. If the alvo can hear you, it can use its reação to make one ataque corpo a corpo com arma and then move up to half its Deslocamento, or vice versa.
material: a small golden crown worth 50 gp

name: Hedgehog Dozen
desc: Eleven illusory duplicates of the touched criatura appear in its space. A criatura affected by hedgehog dozen seems to have a dozen arms, shields, and weapons-a swarm of partially overlapping, identical criaturas. Until the spell ends, these duplicates move with the alvo and mimic its actions, shifting position so it's impossible to track which image is real. You can use your action to dismiss the illusory duplicates. While surrounded by duplicates, a criatura gains vantagem against any opponent because of the bewildering number of weapons and movements. Each time a criatura alvos you with an attack during the spell's duration, roll a d8 to determine whether the attack instead alvos one of your duplicates. On a roll of 1, it strikes you. On any other roll it removes one of your duplicates; when you have only five duplicates remaining, the spell ends. A criatura is unaffected by this spell if it can't see, if it relies on senses other than sight, such as visão cega, or if it can perceive illusions as false as with visão verdadeira.

name: Hedren’s Birds of Clay
desc: You create a number of clay pigeons equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier (minimum of one) that swirl around you. When you are the alvo of a ataque à distância com arma or a ranged ataque mágico and before the jogada de ataque is made, you can use your reação to shout “Pull!” When you do, one clay pigeon maneuvers to block the incoming attack. If the jogada de ataque is less than 10 + your proficiência bonus, the attack misses. Otherwise, make a check with your spellcasting ability modifier and compare it to the jogada de ataque. If your roll is higher, the attack is intercepted and has no effect. Regardless of whether the attack is intercepted, one clay pigeon is expended. The spell ends when the last clay pigeon is used.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, add 1 to your to your roll for each slot level above 3rd when determining if an attack misses or when making a check to intercept the attack.
material: a clay figurine shaped like a bird

name: Hellforging
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You spend an hora calling forth a disembodied evil spirit. no final de that time, the summoned spirit deve fazer a teste de resistência de Carisma. If the teste de resistência succeeds, you take 2d10 dano psíquico plus 2d10 dano necrótico from waves of uncontrolled energy rippling out from the disembodied spirit. You can maintain the spell, forcing the subject to repeat the teste de resistência no final de each of your turns, with the same consequence to you for each failure. If you choose not to maintain the spell or are unable to do so, the evil spirit returns to its place of torment and cannot be recalled. If the teste de resistência fails, the summoned spirit is transferred into the waiting soul gem and immediately animates the constructed body. The subject is now a hellforged; it loses all of its previous racial traits and gains gearforged traits except as follows: Vulnerability: Hellforged are vulnerable to dano radiante. Evil Mind: Hellforged have desvantagem on teste de resistências against spells and abilities of evil fiends or aberrations that effect the mind or behavior. Past Life: The hellforged retains only a vague sense of who it was in its former existence, but these memories are enough for it to gain proficiência in one skill. Languages: Hellforged speak Comum, Machine Speech, and Infernal or Abissal Up to four other spellcasters of at least 5th level can assist you in the ritual. Each assistant increases the CD of the teste de resistência de Carisma by 1. In the event of a failed teste de resistência, the spellcaster and each assistant take damage. An assistant who drops out of the casting can't rejoin.

name: Hellish Rebuke
desc: Você aponta seu dedo e a criatura que causou dano em você é momentaneamente envolta em chamas infernais. A criatura deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza. Ela sofre 2d10 de dano de fogo em uma falha, ou metade desse dano em um sucesso.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2º nível ou superior, o dano aumenta em 1d10 para cada nível de espaço acima do 1º.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take in response to being damaged by a creature within 60 feet of you that you can see

name: Hematomancy
desc:
You can learn information about a criatura whose blood you possess. The alvo deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. If the alvo knows you’re casting the spell, it can fail the teste de resistência voluntarily if it wants you to learn the information. em um sucesso no teste, the alvo isn’t affected, and you can’t use this spell against it again for 24 horas. em uma falha no teste, or if the blood belongs to a dead criatura, you learn the following information:
* The alvo’s most Comum name (if any).
* The alvo’s criatura type (and subtype, if any), gender, and which of its ability scores is highest (though not the exact numerical score).
* The alvo’s current status (alive, dead, sick, wounded, healthy, etc.).
* The circumstances of the alvo shedding the blood you’re holding (bleeding wound, splatter from an attack, how long ago it was shed, etc.).
Alternatively, you can forgo all of the above information and instead use the blood as a beacon to track the alvo. For 1 hora, as long as you are on the same plane of existence as the criatura, you know the direction and distance to the alvo’s location at the time you cast this spell. While moving toward the location, if you are presented with a choice of paths, the spell automatically indicates which path provides the shortest and most direct route to the location.
material: a drop of a criatura’s blood

name: Hero's Steel
desc: You infuse the metal of a melee weapon you touch with the fearsome aura of a mighty hero. The weapon’s wielder has vantagem on Carisma (Intimidação) checks made while aggressively brandishing the weapon. In addition, an opponent that currently has 30 or fewer pontos de vida and is struck by the weapon deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficar atordoado for 1 rodada. If the criatura has more than 30 pontos de vida but fewer than the weapon’s wielder currently has, it becomes amedrontado instead; a amedrontado criatura repeats the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso no teste. A criatura that succeeds on the teste de resistência is immune to castings of this spell on the same weapon for 24 horas.
material: a warrior's amulet worth 5 gp

name: Heroes' Feast
desc: Você conjura um grande banquete, repleto de comidas e bebidas magníficas. O banquete leva 1 hora para ser consumido e desaparece ao fim desse tempo, e os efeitos benéficos só entram em vigor após essa hora ter passado. Até doze outras criaturas podem participar do banquete. Uma criatura que participa do banquete obtém diversos benefícios. A criatura é curada de todas as doenças e venenos, torna-se imune a veneno e à condição amedrontado, e realiza todos os testes de resistência de Sabedoria com vantagem. Seu máximo de pontos de vida também aumenta em 2d10, e ela ganha o mesmo número de pontos de vida. Esses benefícios duram por 24 horas.
material: Uma tigela cravejada de gemas no valor mínimo de 1.000 po, que a magia consome.

name: Heroes' Feast
desc:
The spell summons forth a sumptuous feast with a cuisine of your choosing that provides 1 Supply for a number of criaturas equal to twice your proficiência bonus. Consuming the food recebe 1 hora and leaves a criatura feeling nourished—it immediately makes a teste de resistência with vantagem against any disease or veneno it is suffering from, and it is cured of any effect that frightens it.

For up to 24 horas afterward the feast's participants have vantagem on Sabedoria teste de resistências, vantagem on teste de resistências made against disease and veneno, resistance against damage from veneno and disease, and each increases its ponto de vida maximum by 2d10.

name: Heroism
desc: Uma criatura voluntária que você toca é imbuída de bravura. Até o fim da magia, a criatura é imune à condição amedrontado e ganha pontos de vida temporários iguais ao seu modificador de habilidade de conjuração no início de cada um de seus turnos. Quando a magia termina, o alvo perde quaisquer pontos de vida temporários restantes desta magia.

name: Heroism
desc: The alvo's spirit is bolstered. Until the spell ends, the alvo gains temporary pontos de vida equal to your spellcasting ability modifier no início de cada um de seus turnos and it cannot be amedrontado. Any temporary pontos de vida remaining are lost when the spell ends.
higher_level: alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 1st.

name: Hide in One’s Shadow
desc:
When you touch a willing criatura with a piece of charcoal while casting this spell, the alvo and everything it carries blends into and becomes part of the alvo’s shadow, which remains discernible, although its body seems to disappear. The shadow is incorporeal, has no weight, and is immune to all but psíquico and dano radiante. The alvo remains aware of its surroundings and can move, but only as a shadow could move—flowing along surfaces as if the criatura were moving normally. The criatura can step out of the shadow at will, resuming its physical shape in the shadow’s space and ending the spell.

This spell cannot be cast in an area devoid of leve, where a shadow would not normally appear. Even a faint leve source, such as moonlight or starlight, is sufficient. If that leve source is removed, or if the shadow is flooded with leve in such a way that the physical criatura wouldn’t cast a shadow, the spell ends and the criatura reappears in the shadow’s space.
material: charcoal

name: Hideous Laughter
desc: Uma criatura à sua escolha que você pode ver dentro do alcance percebe tudo como hilariantemente engraçado e cai em ataques de riso se esta magia a afetar. O alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou cair prostrado, ficando incapacitado e incapaz de se levantar durante a duração. Uma criatura com valor de Inteligência 4 ou menos não é afetada. No final de cada um de seus turnos, e cada vez que sofre dano, o alvo pode fazer outro teste de resistência de Sabedoria. O alvo tem vantagem no teste de resistência se ele for provocado por dano. Se bem-sucedido, a magia termina.
material: Pequenas tortas e uma pena que é agitada no ar.

name: Hideous Laughter
desc:
The alvo is overwhelmed by the absurdity of the world and is crippled by paroxysms of laughter. The alvo falls prostrado, becomes incapacitado, and cannot stand.

Until the spell ends, no final de each of the alvo's turns and when it suffers damage, the alvo may attempt another teste de resistência (with vantagem if triggered by damage). em um sucesso no teste, the spell ends.
higher_level: alvo an additional criatura within 30 pés of the original for each slot level above 1st.

name: High Ground
desc:
With a word, you gesture across an area and cause the terrain to rise up into a 10-pé-tall hillock at a point you choose within range. You must be outdoors to cast this spell. The hillock is up to 30 pés long and up to 15 pés wide, and it must be in a line. If the hillock cuts through a criatura's space when it appears, the criatura is pushed to one side of the hillock or to the top of the hillock (your choice). The ataque à distância distance for a criatura on top of the hillock is doubled, provided the alvo is at a lower elevation than the criatura on the hillock. At the GM's discretion, criaturas on top of the hillock gain any additional bonuses or penalties that higher elevation might provide, such as vantagem on attacks against those on lower elevations, being easier to spot, longer sight distance, or similar.
  The steep sides of the hillock are difficult to climb. A criatura at the bottom of the hillock that attempts to move up to the top deve ter sucesso em a Força (Atletismo) or Destreza (Acrobacia) check against your CD de resistência à magia to climb to the top of the hillock.
  This spell can't manipulate stone construction, and rocks and structures shift to accommodate the hillock. If the hillock's formation would make a structure unstable, the hillock fails to form in the structure's spaces. Similarly, this spell doesn't directly affect plant growth. The hillock carries any plants along with it.
higher_level: When you cast this spell at 4th level or higher, you can increase the width of the hillock by 5 pés or the length by 10 pés for each slot above 3rd.

name: Hirvsth's Call
desc: Deep Magic: Rothenian You summon a spectral herd of ponies to drag off a criatura that you can see in range. The alvo must be no bigger than Large and deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. em um sucesso no teste, the spell has no effect. em uma falha no teste, a spectral rope wraps around the alvo and pulls it 60 pés in a direction of your choosing as the herd races off. The ponies continue running in the chosen direction for the duration of the spell but will alter course to avoid impassable obstacles. Once you choose the direction, you cannot change it. The ponies ignore difficult terrain and are immune to damage. The alvo is prostrado and immobilized but can use its action to make a Força or teste de Destreza against your spell CD to escape the spectral bindings. The alvo recebe 1d6 dano contundente for every 20 pés it is dragged by the ponies. The herd moves 60 pés each rodada at the beginning of your turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, one additional criatura can be alvoed for each slot level above 4th.

name: Hoarfrost
desc: A melee weapon you are holding is imbued with frio. For the duration, a rime of frost covers the weapon and leve vapor rises from it if the temperature is above freezing. The weapon becomes mágico and causa an extra 1d4 dano de frio on a successful hit. The spell ends after 1 minuto, or earlier if you make a successful attack with the weapon or let go of it.
higher_level: The spell’s damage increases by 1d4 when you alcance 5th level (2d4), 11th level (3d4), and 17th level (4d4).
material: a melee weapon

name: Hobble
desc: You create an ethereal trap in the space of a criatura you can see within range. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza or its Deslocamento is halved até o final de seu próximo turno.
material: a broken rabbit’s pé
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Hobble Mount
desc:
When you cast **hobble mount** as a successful melee ataque mágico against a horse, wolf, or other four-legged or two-legged beast being ridden as a mount, that beast is disabled so that it can’t move at its normal Deslocamento without incurring injury. An affected criatura that moves more than half its base Deslocamento in a turn recebe 2d6 dano contundente.

This spell has no effect on a criatura that your GM deems to not be a mount.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, o dano increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 1st.
dnd_class: Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Warlock, Wizard

name: Hod's Gift
desc: The alvo gains visão cega to a range of 60 pés.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the duration is increased by 1 hora for every slot above 5th level.

name: Hold Monster
desc: Escolha uma criatura que você possa ver dentro do alcance. O alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar paralisado pela duração da magia. Esta magia não tem efeito contra mortos-vivos. No final de cada rodada, o alvo pode fazer um novo teste de resistência de Sabedoria. Se bem-sucedido, a magia termina para a criatura.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de nível 6 ou superior, você pode ter como alvo uma criatura adicional para cada nível de espaço acima do quinto. As criaturas devem estar a até 9m umas das outras quando você as escolher como alvo.
material: Um pequeno pedaço de ferro.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Paladin, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Hold Monster
desc: The alvo is paralisado. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo makes another teste de resistência, ending the spell's effects on it em um sucesso no teste.
higher_level: alvo an additional criatura within 30 pés of the first alvo for each slot level above 5th.

name: Hold Person
desc: Escolha um humanoide que você possa ver dentro do alcance. O alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar paralisado pela duração. No final de cada um de seus turnos, o alvo pode fazer outro teste de resistência de Sabedoria. Se bem-sucedido, a magia termina sobre o alvo.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3º nível ou superior, você pode ter como alvo um humanoide adicional para cada nível de espaço acima do 2º. Os humanoides devem estar a até 9m uns dos outros quando você os escolher como alvo.
material: Um pequeno pedaço reto de ferro.
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Hold Person
desc: The alvo is paralisado. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo makes another teste de resistência, ending the spell's effects on it em um sucesso no teste.
higher_level: alvo an additional criatura within 30 pés of the first alvo for each slot level above 2nd.
dnd_class: Artificer, Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Holy Aura
desc: Luz divina emana de você e se consolida em uma suave radiosidade em um raio de 9m ao seu redor. Criaturas à sua escolha nesse raio quando você conjura esta magia emitem luz fraca em um raio de 1,5m e têm vantagem em todos os testes de resistência, e outras criaturas têm desvantagem nas jogadas de ataque contra elas até o fim da magia. Além disso, quando um corruptor ou um morto-vivo acerta uma criatura afetada com um ataque corpo a corpo, a aura brilha com uma luz intensa. O atacante deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar cego até o fim da magia.
material: Um pequeno relicário no valor de pelo menos 1.000 po contendo uma relíquia sagrada, como um pedaço de tecido da roupa de um santo ou um fragmento de pergaminho de um texto religioso.

name: Holy Aura
desc: Holy radiance emanates from you and fills the area. alvos shed dim leve in a 5-pé radius and have vantagem on teste de resistências. Attacks made against a alvo have desvantagem. When a fiend or undead hits a alvo, the aura erupts into blinding leve, forcing the attacker to make a teste de resistência de Constituição ou ficar cego until the spell ends.

name: Holy Ground
desc: You invoke divine powers to bless the ground within 60 pés of you. criaturas slain in the affected area cannot be raised as undead by magic or by the abilities of monsters, even if the corpse is later removed from the area. Any spell of 4th level or lower that would summon or animate undead within the area fails automatically. Such spells cast with espaços de magia of 5th level or higher function normally.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, the level of spells that are prevented from functioning increases by 1 for each slot level above 5th.
material: a vial of holy water that is consumed in the casting

name: Hone Blade
desc: You magically sharpen the edge of any bladed weapon or object you are touching. The alvo weapon gets a +1 bonus to damage on its next successful hit.
material: a chip of whetstone or lodestone

name: Hunger of Leng
desc:
You curse a criatura that you can see in range with an insatiable, ghoulish appetite. If it has a digestive system, the criatura deve fazer a successful teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficar compelled to consume the flesh of living criaturas for the duration.

The alvo gains a bite attack and moves to and attacks the closest criatura that isn’t an undead or a construct. The alvo is proficiente with the bite, and it adds its Força modifier to the attack and damage rolls. o dano is perfurante and o dano die is a d4. If the alvo is larger than Medium, its damage die increases by 1d4 for each size category it is above Medium. In addition, the alvo has vantagem on ataque corpo a corpo rolls against any criatura that doesn’t have all of its pontos de vida.

If there isn’t a viable criatura within range for the alvo to attack, it causa dano perfurante to itself equal to 2d4 + its Força modifier. The alvo can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect em um sucesso. If the alvo has two consecutive failures, **hunger of Leng** lasts its full duration with no further teste de resistências allowed.
material: a pinch of salt and a drop of the caster’s blood
dnd_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Hunter's Endurance
desc: You call on the land to sustain you as you hunt your quarry. Describe or name a criatura that is familiar to you. If you aren't familiar with the alvo criatura, you must use a fingernail, lock of hair, bit of fur, or drop of blood from it as a componente material to alvo that criatura with this spell. Until the spell ends, you have vantagem on all Sabedoria (Percepção) and Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks to find and track the alvo, and you must actively pursue the alvo as if under a geas. In addition, you don't suffer from exaustão levels you gain from pursuing your quarry, such as from lack of rest or environmental hazards between you and the alvo, while the spell is active. When the spell ends, you suffer from all levels of exaustão that were suspended by the spell. The spell ends only after 24 horas, when the alvo is dead, when the alvo is on a different plane, or when the alvo is imobilizado in your line of sight.
material: a fingernail, lock of hair, bit of fur, or drop of blood from the alvo, if unfamiliar

name: Hunter's Mark
desc: Você escolhe uma criatura que pode ver dentro do alcance e a marca misticamente como sua presa. Até o fim do feitiço, você causa 1d6 de dano extra ao alvo sempre que o acertar com um ataque com arma, e você tem vantagem em qualquer teste de Sabedoria (Percepção) ou Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) feito para encontrá-la. Se o alvo cair a 0 pontos de vida antes do fim do feitiço, você pode usar uma ação bônus em um turno subsequente seu para marcar uma nova criatura.
higher_level: Quando você conjura este feitiço usando um espaço de magia de 3º ou 4º nível, você pode manter sua concentração no feitiço por até 8 horas. Quando você usa um espaço de magia de 5º nível ou superior, você pode manter sua concentração no feitiço por até 24 horas.

name: Hunting Stand
desc: You make a camouflaged shelter nestled in the branches of a tree or among a collection of stones. The shelter is a 10-pé cube centered on a point within range. It can hold as many as nine Medium or smaller criaturas. The atmosphere inside the shelter is comfortable and dry, regardless of the weather outside. The shelter's camouflage provides a modicum of concealment to its inhabitants; a criatura outside the shelter has desvantagem on Sabedoria (Percepção) and Inteligência (Investigação) checks to detect or locate a criatura within the shelter.
material: a crude model of the stand

name: Hypnagogia
desc:
You alter the mental state of uma criatura you can see within range. The alvo deve fazer an teste de resistência de Inteligência. If it fails, choose one of the following effects. no final de cada um de seus turnos, the alvo can make another teste de resistência de Inteligência. em um sucesso, the spell ends on the alvo. A criatura with an Inteligência score of 4 or less isn't affected by this spell.
  ***Sleep Paralysis.*** Overwhelming heaviness and fatigue overcome the criatura, slowing it. The criatura's Deslocamento is halved, and it has desvantagem on weapon attacks.
  ***Phantasmata.*** The criatura imagines vivid and terrifying hallucinations centered on a point of your choice within range. For the duration, the criatura is amedrontado, and it must take the Dash action and move away from the point you chose by the safest available route on cada um de seus turnos, unless there is nowhere to move.
  ***False Awakening.*** The criatura enters a trancelike state of consciousness in which it's not fully aware of its surroundings. It can't take reactions, and it must roll a d4 at the beginning of its turn to determine its behavior. Each time the alvo recebe damage, it makes a new teste de resistência de Inteligência. em um sucesso, the spell ends on the alvo.

| d4  | Behavior  | 
|-----|-----------| 
| 1   | The criatura recebe the Dash action and uses all of its movement to move in a random direction. To determine the direction, roll a d8 and assign a direction to each die face.  | 
| 2   | The criatura uses its action to pantomime preparing for its dia: brushing teeth and hair, bathing, eating, or similar activity.  | 
| 3   | The criatura moves up to its Deslocamento toward a randomly determined criatura and uses its action to make one ataque corpo a corpo against that criatura. If there is no criatura within range, the criatura does nothing this turn. | 
| 4   | The criatura does nothing this turn. |
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 4th. The criaturas must be within 30 pés of each other when you alvo them.

name: Hypnic Jerk
desc: Strange things happen in the mind and body in that moment between waking and sleeping. One of the most Comum is being startled awake by a sudden feeling of falling. With a snap of your fingers, you trigger that sensation in a criatura you can see within range. The alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou receber 1d6 dano de força. If the alvo fails the teste de resistência by 5 or more, it drops one object it is holding. A dropped object lands in the criatura's space.
higher_level: The spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you alcance 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Hypnotic Pattern
desc: Você cria um padrão de cores retorcidas que se entrelaçam pelo ar dentro de um cubo de 9 metros dentro do alcance. O padrão aparece por um momento e desaparece. Cada criatura na área que vir o padrão deve realizar um teste de resistência de Sabedoria. Se falhar, a criatura fica enfeitiçada pela duração. Enquanto enfeitiçada por este feitiço, a criatura fica incapacitada e com velocidade 0. O feitiço termina para uma criatura afetada se ela sofrer qualquer dano ou se outra criatura usar uma ação para sacudi-la e tirá-la de seu torpor.
material: Um bastão de incenso brilhante ou um frasco de cristal cheio de material fosforescente.

name: Hypnotic Pattern
desc:
You conjure a swirling pattern of twisting hues that roils through the air, appearing for a moment and then vanishing. criaturas in the area that can perceive the pattern make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria or become enfeitiçado. A criatura enfeitiçado by this spell becomes incapacitado and its Deslocamento is reduced to 0.

The effect ends on a criatura when it recebe damage or when another criatura uses an action to shake it out of its daze.

name: Ice Fortress
desc:
A gleaming fortress of ice springs from a square area of ground that you can see within range. It is a 10-pé cube (including floor and roof). The fortress can’t overlap any other structures, but any criaturas in its space are harmlessly lifted up as the ice rises into position. The walls are made of ice (AC 13), have 120 pontos de vida each, and are immune to frio, necrótico, veneno, and dano psíquico. Reducing a wall to 0 pontos de vida destroys it and has a 50 percent chance to cause the roof to collapse. A damaged wall can be repaired by casting a spell that causa dano de frio on it, on a point-for-point basis.

Each wall has two arrow slits. One wall also includes an ice door with an [arcane lock](https://api.open5e.com/spells/arcane-lock). You designate at the time of the fort’s creation which criaturas can enter the fortification. The door has AC 18 and 60 pontos de vida, or it can be broken open with a successful CD 25 Força (Atletismo) check (CD 15 if the [arcane lock](https://api.open5e.com/spells/arcane-lock) is dispelled).

The fortress catches and reflects leve, so that criaturas outside the fortress who rely on sight have desvantagem on Percepção checks and attack rolls made against those within the fortress if it’s in an area of bright sunlight.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, you can increase the length or width of the fortification by 5 pés for every slot level above 5th. You can make a different choice (width or length) for each slot level above 5th.
material: a miniature keep carved from ice or glass that is consumed in the casting

name: Ice Hammer
desc:
When you cast **ice hammer**, a warhammer fashioned from ice appears in your hands. This weapon functions as a standard warhammer in all ways, and it causa an extra 1d10 dano de frio on a hit. You can drop the warhammer or give it to another criatura.

The warhammer melts and is destroyed when it or its user accumulates 20 or more dano de fogo, or when the spell ends.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can create one additional hammer for each slot level above 2nd. Alternatively, you can create half as many hammers (rodada down), but each is oversized (1d10 dano contundente, or 1d12 if wielded with two hands, plus 2d8 dano de frio). Medium or smaller criaturas have desvantagem when using oversized weapons, even if they are proficiente with them.
material: a miniature hammer carved from ice or glass

name: Ice Soldiers
desc: You pour water from the vial and cause two [ice soldiers](https://api.open5e.com/monsters/ice-soldier) to appear within range. The ice soldiers cannot form if there is no space available for them. The ice soldiers act immediately on your turn. You can mentally command them (no action required by you) to move and act where and how you desire. If you command an ice soldier to attack, it attacks that criatura exclusively until the alvo is dead, at which time the soldier melts into a puddle of water. If an ice soldier moves farther than 30 pés from you, it immediately melts.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 8th level or higher, you create one additional ice soldier.
material: vial of water

name: Ice Storm
desc: Uma chuva de gelo duro como rocha martela o chão em um cilindro de 6 metros de raio e 12 metros de altura, centralizado em um ponto dentro do alcance. Cada criatura no cilindro deve realizar um teste de resistência de Destreza. Uma criatura sofre 2d8 de dano de concussão e 4d6 de dano de frio se falhar no teste, ou metade desse dano se for bem-sucedida. As pedras de granizo transformam a área de efeito da tempestade em terreno difícil até o fim do seu próximo turno.
higher_level: Quando você conjura este feitiço usando um espaço de magia de 5º nível ou superior, o dano de concussão aumenta em 1d8 para cada nível de espaço acima do 4º.
material: Uma pitada de poeira e algumas gotas de água.

name: Ice Storm
desc: A bombardment of jagged ice erupts throughout the alvo area. todas as criaturas in the area take 2d8 dano contundente and 4d6 dano de frio. Large chunks of ice turn the area into difficult terrain until the end of your next turn.
higher_level: The dano contundente increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Icicle Daggers
desc:
When you cast this spell, three icicles appear in your hand. Each icicle has the same properties as a dagger but causa an extra 1d4 dano de frio on a hit.

The icicle daggers melt a few seconds after leaving your hand, making it impossible for other criaturas to wield them. If the surrounding temperature is at or below freezing, the daggers last for 1 hora. They melt instantly if you take 10 or more dano de fogo.
higher_level: If you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 2nd level or higher, you can create two additional daggers for each slot level above 1st. If you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, daggers that leave your hand don’t melt until the start of your next turn.
material: a miniature dagger shaped like an icicle

name: Icy Grasp of the Void
desc: You summon the frio, inky darkness of the Void into being around a criatura that you can see. The alvo recebe 10d10 dano de frio and is imobilizado for the duration; a successful teste de resistência de Constituição halves o dano and negates the imobilizado condition. A imobilizado criatura gains one level of exaustão no início de cada um de seus turnos. criaturas immune to frio and that do not breathe do not gain exaustão. A criatura imobilizado in this way can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the spell em um sucesso.

name: Icy Manipulation
desc:
uma criatura you can see within range deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição. em uma falha no teste, the criatura is petrificado (frozen solid). A petrificado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, ending the effect on itself if it makes two successful saves. If a petrificado criatura gets two failures on the teste de resistência (not counting the original failure that caused the petrification), the petrification becomes permenant.

The petrification also becomes permanent if you maintain Concentração on this spell for a full minuto. A permanently petrificado/frozen criatura can be restored to normal with [greater restoration](https://api.open5e.com/spells/greater-restoration) or comparable magic, or by casting this spell on the criatura again and maintaining Concentração for a full minuto.

If the frozen criatura is damaged or broken before it recovers from being petrificado, the injury carries over to its normal state.
material: a piece of ice preserved from the plane of elemental ice

name: Identify
desc: Você escolhe um objeto que deve tocar durante toda a conjuração do feitiço. Se for um item mágico ou algum outro objeto imbuído de magia, você aprende suas propriedades e como utilizá-las, se ele requer sintonia para ser usado, e quantas cargas ele possui, se houver. Você descobre se algum feitiço está afetando o item e quais são esses feitiços. Se o item foi criado por um feitiço, você descobre qual feitiço o criou. Se, em vez disso, você tocar uma criatura durante toda a conjuração, você descobre quais feitiços, se houver, estão afetando-a atualmente.
material: Uma pérola no valor de pelo menos 100 po e uma pena de coruja.

name: Identify
desc:
You learn the alvo item's mágico properties along with how to use them. This spell also reveals whether or not a alvoed item requires attunement and how many charges it has. You learn what spells are affecting the alvoed item (if any) along with what spells were used to create it.

Alternatively, you learn any spells that are currently affecting a alvoed criatura.

What this spell can reveal is at the Narrator's discretion, and some powerful and rare magics are immune to identify.

name: Ill-Fated Word
desc: You call out a distracting epithet to a criatura, worsening its chance to succeed at whatever it's doing. Roll a d4 and subtract the number rolled from an jogada de ataque, teste de habilidade, or teste de resistência that the alvo has just made; the alvo uses the lowered result to determine the outcome of its roll.
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when an enemy makes an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw

name: Illuminate Spoor
desc:
You touch a set of tracks created by a single criatura. That set of tracks and all other tracks made by the same criatura give off a faint glow. You and up to three criaturas you designate when you cast this spell can see the glow. A criatura that can see the glow automatically succeeds on Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks to track that criatura. If the tracks are covered by obscuring objects such as leaves or mud, you and the criaturas you designate have vantagem on Sabedoria (Sobrevivência) checks to follow the tracks.
  If the criatura leaving the tracks changes its tracks, such as by adding or removing footwear, the glow stops where the tracks change. Until the spell ends, you can use an action to touch and illuminate a new set of tracks.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, the duration is Concentração, up to 8 horas. When you use a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the duration is Concentração, up to 24 horas.
material: a firefly

name: Illusory Script
desc: Você escreve em pergaminho, papel ou outro material de escrita adequado e o imbuí com uma poderosa ilusão que dura pela duração. Para você e quaisquer criaturas que você designar ao conjurar o feitiço, a escrita parece normal, feita com sua caligrafia, e transmite o significado que você pretendia ao escrever o texto. Para todos os outros, a escrita parece ter sido feita em um idioma desconhecido ou mágico, sendo ininteligível. Alternativamente, você pode fazer a escrita parecer ser uma mensagem completamente diferente, feita com outra caligrafia e em outro idioma, desde que seja um idioma que você conheça. Caso o feitiço seja dissipado, o texto original e a ilusão desaparecem. Uma criatura com visão verdadeira pode ler a mensagem oculta.
material: Uma tinta à base de chumbo no valor de pelo menos 10 po, que este feitiço consome.

name: Illusory Script
desc:
You inscribe a message onto the alvo and wrap it in illusion until the spell ends. You and any criaturas that you designate when the spell is cast perceive the message as normal. You may choose to have other criaturas view the message as writing in an unknown or unintelligible mágico script or a different message. If you choose to create another message, you can change the handwriting and the language that the message is written in, though you must know the language in question.

If the spell is dispelled, both the message and its illusory mask disappear.

The true message can be perceived by any criatura with visão verdadeira.

name: Imbue Spell
desc: Deep Magic: clockwork You imbue a spell of 1st thru 3rd level that has a casting time of Instantâneo onto a gear worth 100 gp per level of spell you are imbuing. no final de the ritual, the gear is placed into a piece of clockwork that includes a timer or trigger mechanism. When the timer or trigger goes off, the spell is cast. If the range of the spell was Touch, it effects only a alvo touching the device. If the spell had a range in pés, the spell is cast on the closest viable alvo within range, based on the Natureza of the spell. Spells with a range of Self or Sight can't be imbued. If the gear is placed with a timer, it activates when the time elapses regardless of whether a legitimate alvo is available.
higher_level: You can perform this ritual as a 7th-level spell to imbue a spell of 4th or 5th level.

name: Immolating Gibbet
desc:
You cause up to three criaturas you can see within range to be yanked into the air where their blood turns to fogo, burning them from within. Each alvo deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar magically pulled up to 60 into the air. The criatura is imobilizado there until the spell ends. A imobilizado criatura deve fazer a teste de resistência de Constituição no início de cada um de seus turnos. The criatura recebe 7d6 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much damage on a successful one.
  no final de cada um de seus turnos, a imobilizado criatura can make another teste de resistência de Destreza. em um sucesso, the spell ends on the criatura, and the criatura falls to the ground, taking falling damage as normal. Alternatively, the imobilizado criatura or someone else who can alcance it can use an action to make an Inteligência (Arcanismo) check against your CD de resistência à magia. em um sucesso, the imobilizado effect ends, and the criatura falls to the ground, taking falling damage as normal.

name: Impending Ally
desc: You summon a duplicate of yourself as an aliado who appears in an unoccupied space you can see within range. You control this aliado, whose turn comes immediately after yours. When you or the aliado uses a class feature, espaço de magia, or other expendable resource, it’s considered expended for both of you. When the spell ends, or if you are killed, the aliado disappears immediately.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 5th level or higher, the duration is extended by 1 rodada for every two slot levels above 3rd.
material: a broken chain link

name: Imprisonment
desc:
Você cria uma restrição mágica para prender uma criatura que pode ver dentro do alcance. O alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficará preso pela magia; se tiver sucesso, será imune a esta magia caso você a conjure novamente. Enquanto afetada por esta magia, a criatura não precisa respirar, comer ou beber, e não envelhece. Magias de adivinhação não conseguem localizar ou perceber o alvo. Ao conjurar a magia, você escolhe uma das seguintes formas de aprisionamento.

**Sepultamento.** O alvo é entombado profundamente sob a terra em uma esfera de força mágica grande o suficiente apenas para contê-lo. Nada pode atravessar a esfera, e nenhuma criatura pode se teleportar ou usar viagem planar para entrar ou sair dela. O componente especial para esta versão da magia é um pequeno orbe de mithral.

**Acorrentamento.** Correntes pesadas, firmemente fixadas ao chão, prendem o alvo no lugar. O alvo fica restrito até o fim da magia e não pode se mover nem ser movido por qualquer meio até lá. O componente especial para esta versão da magia é uma corrente fina de metal precioso.

**Prisão Cercada.** A magia transporta o alvo para um minúsculo semiplano protegido contra teleportação e viagem planar. O semiplano pode ser um labirinto, uma gaiola, uma torre ou qualquer estrutura ou área confinada semelhante, à sua escolha. O componente especial para esta versão da magia é uma representação em miniatura da prisão feita de jade.

**Contenção Mínima.** O alvo encolhe até 2,5 centímetros de altura e fica aprisionado dentro de uma gema ou objeto semelhante. A luz pode atravessar a gema normalmente (permitindo que o alvo veja para fora e outras criaturas vejam para dentro), mas nada mais pode atravessá-la, nem mesmo por meio de teleportação ou viagem planar. A gema não pode ser cortada ou quebrada enquanto a magia estiver em vigor. O componente especial para esta versão da magia é uma gema grande e transparente, como um coríndon, diamante ou rubi.

**Sono Profundo.** O alvo adormece e não pode ser acordado. O componente especial para esta versão da magia consiste em ervas soporíferas raras.

**Encerrando a Magia.** Durante a conjuração da magia, em qualquer de suas versões, você pode especificar uma condição que fará a magia terminar e libertar o alvo. A condição pode ser tão específica ou elaborada quanto você desejar, mas o Mestre deve concordar que ela é razoável e tem chance de se concretizar. As condições podem ser baseadas no nome, identidade ou divindade de uma criatura, mas de outra forma devem ser baseadas em ações ou qualidades observáveis, e não em aspectos intangíveis como nível, classe ou pontos de vida. Uma magia de Dispel Magic só pode encerrar este efeito se conjurada como magia de 9º nível, tendo como alvo a prisão ou o componente especial usado para criá-la. Você pode usar um componente especial específico para criar apenas uma prisão por vez. Se você conjurar a magia novamente usando o mesmo componente, o alvo da primeira conjuração será imediatamente libertado de sua prisão.
material: Uma representação em pergaminho ou uma estatueta esculpida à semelhança do alvo, e um componente especial que varia de acordo com a versão da magia escolhida, valendo pelo menos 500 po por Dado de Vida do alvo.

name: Imprisonment
desc:
You utter the alvo's name and attempt to bind them for eternity. em um sucesso no teste, a alvo is immune to any future attempts by you to cast this spell on it. em uma falha no teste, choose from one of the forms of bindings below (each lasts until the spell ends).

* **Burial:** The alvo is buried deep below the surface of the earth in a tomb just large enough to contain it. Nothing can enter the tomb. No teleportation or planar travel can be used to enter, leave, or affect the tomb or its contents. A small mithral orb is required for this casting.
* **Chaining:** Chains made of unbreakable material erupt from the ground and root the alvo in place. The alvo is imobilizado and cannot be moved by any means. A small adamantine chain is required for this casting.
* **Hedged Prison:** The alvo is imprisoned in a maze-like demiplane of your choosing, such as a labyrinth, a cage, a tower, a hedge maze, or any similar structure you desire. The demiplane is warded against teleportation and planar travel. A small jade representation of the demiplane is required for this casting.
* **Minimus Containment:** The alvo shrinks to just under an inch and is imprisoned inside a gemstone, crystal, jar, or similar object. Nothing but leve can pass in and out of the vessel, and it cannot be broken, cut, or otherwise damaged. The especial component for this effect is whatever prison you wish to use.
* **Slumber:** The alvo is plunged into an unbreakable slumber and cannot be awoken. especial soporific draughts are required for this casting.

The alvo does not need sustenance or air, nor does it age. No divination spells of any sort can be used to reveal the alvo's location.

When cast, you must specify a condition that will cause the spell to end and release the alvo. This condition must be based on some observable action or quality and not related to mechanics like level, hitpoints, or class, and the Narrator must agree to it.

A dispel magic only dispels an _imprisonment_ if it is cast using a 9th-level espaço de magia and alvos the prison or the especial component used to create the prison.

Each casting that uses the same spell effect requires its own especial component. Repeated castings with the same component free the prior occupant.

name: Incantation of Lies Made Truth
desc: This ritual must be cast during a solar eclipse. It can alvo a person, an organization (including a city), or a kingdom. If alvoing an organization or a kingdom, the incantation requires an object epitomizing the entity as part of the componente material, such as a crown, mayoral seal, standard, or primary relic. If alvoing a person, the primary performer must hold a vial of the person's blood. Over the course of the incantation, the components are mixed and the primary caster inscribes a false História and a sum of knowledge concerning the alvo into the book using the mockingbird quills. When the incantation is completed, whatever the caster wrote in the book becomes known and accepted as truth by the alvo. The alvo can attempt a teste de resistência de Sabedoria to negate this effect. If the alvo was a city or a kingdom, the teste de resistência is made with vantagem by its current leader or ruler. If the teste de resistência fails, all citizens or members of the alvo organization or kingdom believe the account written in the book to be fact. Any information contrary to what was written in the book is forgotten within an hora, but individuals who make a sustained study of such information can attempt a teste de resistência de Sabedoria to retain the contradictory knowledge. Books containing contradictory information are considered obsolete or purposely misleading. Permanent structures such as statues of heroes who've been written out of existence are believed to be purely artistic endeavors or so old that no one remembers their identities anymore. The effects of this ritual can be reversed by washing the written words from the book using universal solvent and then burning the book to ashes in a mágico fogo. Incantation of lies made truth is intended to be a villainous motivator in a campaign, with the player characters fighting to uncover the truth and reverse the spell's effect. The GM should take care not to remove too much player agency with this ritual. The criaturas affected should be predominantly NPCs, with PCs and even select NPCs able to resist it. Reversing the effect of the ritual can be the entire basis of a campaign.

name: Incendiary Cloud
desc: Uma nuvem de fumaça redemoinhante permeada por brasas incandescentes surge em uma esfera de 6 metros de raio centrada em um ponto dentro do alcance. A nuvem se espalha contornando esquinas e é fortemente obscurecida. Ela dura pela duração ou até que um vento de velocidade moderada ou maior (pelo menos 16 km/h) a disperse. Quando a nuvem surge, cada criatura dentro dela deve realizar um teste de resistência de Destreza. Uma criatura sofre 10d8 de dano de fogo em uma falha, ou metade desse dano em um sucesso. Uma criatura também deve realizar este teste de resistência quando entrar na área da magia pela primeira vez em um turno ou encerrar seu turno lá. A nuvem se move 3 metros diretamente para longe de você em uma direção que você escolhe no início de cada um dos seus turnos.

name: Incendiary Cloud
desc:
A cloud of burning embers, smoke, and roiling flame appears within range. The cloud heavily obscures its area, spreading around corners and through cracks. When the cloud appears and a criatura is in it, when a criatura enters the cloud for the first time on a turn, or when a criatura ends its turn within the cloud it makes a teste de resistência de Destreza, taking 10d8 dano de fogo em uma falha no teste, or half as much on a successful one.

The cloud can be dispelled by a wind of at least 10 milhas per hora. After it is cast, the cloud moves 10 pés away from you in a direction that you choose no início de each of your turns.

name: Inconspicuous Facade
desc: By means of this spell, you make a alvo building seem much less important or ostentatious than it is. You can give the alvo an unremarkable appearance or one that blends in with nearby buildings. By its Natureza, this spell does not allow you to specify features that would make the building stand out. You also cannot make a building look more opulent to match surrounding buildings. You can make the building appear smaller or larger that its actual size to better fit into its environs. However, these size changes are noticeable with cursory physical inspection as an object will pass through extra illusory space or bump into a seemingly smaller section of the building. A criatura can use its action to inspect the building and make an Inteligência (Investigação) check against your CD de resistência à magia. If it succeeds, it becomes aware the building has been disguised. In addition to you dispelling inconspicuous facade, the spell ends if the alvo building is destroyed.

name: Inescapable Malady
desc:
You infect your alvo with an arcane disease. At any time after you cast this spell, as long as you are on the same plane of existence as the alvo, you can use an action to deal 7d10 dano necrótico to the alvo. If this damage would reduce the alvo to 0 pontos de vida, you can choose to leave it with 1 ponto de vida.

As part of dealing o dano, you may expend a 7th-level espaço de magia to sustain the disease. Otherwise, the spell ends. The spell ends when you die.

Casting remove curse, greater restoration, or heal on the alvo allows the alvo to make a teste de resistência de Constituição against the disease. Otherwise the disease can only be cured by a wish spell.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 7th.

name: Inexorable Summons
desc: You alcance out toward a criatura and call to it. The alvo teleports to an unoccupied space that you can see within 5 pés of you. An unwilling criatura can make a teste de resistência de Sabedoria, and if it succeeds, it isn't affected by this spell. You can't teleport a alvo into dangerous terrain, such as lava, and the alvo must be teleported to a space on the ground or on a floor.

name: Infernal Weapon
desc:
A weapon formed from the essence of Hell appears in your hands. You must use two hands to wield the weapon. If you let go of the weapon, it disappears and the spell ends.

When you cast the spell, choose either a flame fork or ice spear. While the spell lasts, you can use an action to make a melee ataque mágico with the weapon against a criatura within 10 pés of you.

On a hit, you deal 5d8 damage of a type determined by the weapon's form. On a critical hit, you inflict an additional effect.

In addition, on a hit with the Infernal weapon, you can end the spell early to inflict an automatic critical hit.

**Flame Fork.** The weapon causa dano de fogo.

On a critical hit, the alvo catches fogo, taking 2d6 ongoing dano de fogo.

**Ice Spear.** The weapon causa dano de frio. On a critical hit, for 1 minuto the alvo is slowed.

no final de cada um de seus turnos a slowed criatura can make a teste de resistência de Constituição, ending the effect on itself em um sucesso.

A criatura reduced to 0 pontos de vida by an Infernal weapon immediately dies in a gruesome fashion.

For example, a criatura killed by an ice spear might freeze solid, then shatter into a thousand pieces. cada criatura of your choice within 60 pés of the criatura and who can see it when it dies deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, a criatura becomes amedrontado of you until the end of your next turn.

name: Inflict Wounds
desc: Realize um ataque de magia corpo a corpo contra uma criatura que você possa alcançar. Em um acerto, o alvo sofre 3d10 de dano necrótico.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2º nível ou superior, o dano aumenta em 1d10 para cada nível de espaço acima do 1º.

name: Inflict Wounds
desc: You impart fell energies that suck away the alvo's life força, making a melee ataque mágico that causa 3d10 dano necrótico.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Innocuous Aspect
desc:
An area of false vision encompasses todas as criaturas within 20 pés of you. You and cada criatura in the area that you choose to affect take on the appearance of a harmless criatura or object, chosen by you. Each image is identical, and only appearance is affected. Sound, movement, or physical inspection can reveal the ruse.

A criatura that uses its action to study the image visually can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Inteligência (Investigação) check against your CD de resistência à magia. If a criatura discerns the illusion for what it is, that criatura sees through the image.
material: a paper ring

name: Insect Plague
desc: Um enxame de gafanhotos vorazes preenche uma esfera de 6 metros de raio centrada em um ponto que você escolhe dentro do alcance. A esfera se espalha contornando esquinas. A esfera permanece pela duração, e sua área é levemente obscurecida. A área da esfera é terreno difícil. Quando a área surge, cada criatura nela deve realizar um teste de resistência de Constituição. Uma criatura sofre 4d10 de dano perfurante em uma falha, ou metade desse dano em um sucesso. Uma criatura também deve realizar este teste de resistência quando entrar na área da magia pela primeira vez em um turno ou encerrar seu turno lá.
higher_level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 6º nível ou superior, o dano aumenta em 1d10 para cada nível de espaço acima do 5º.
material: Alguns grãos de açúcar, alguns grãos de cereal e um pouco de gordura.

name: Insect Plague
desc: A roiling cloud of insects appears, biting and stinging any criaturas it touches. The cloud lightly obscures its area, spreads around corners, and is considered difficult terrain. When the cloud appears and a criatura is in it, when a criatura enters the cloud for the first time on a turn, or when a criatura ends its turn within the cloud it makes a teste de resistência de Constituição, taking 4d10 dano perfurante em uma falha no teste, or half as much on a successful one.
higher_level: o dano increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Insightful Maneuver
desc: With a flash of Intuição, you know how to take vantagem of your foe’s vulnerabilities. Until the end of your turn, the alvo has vulnerability to one type of damage (your choice). Additionally, if the alvo has any other vulnerabilities, you learn them.
dnd_class: Cleric, Paladin, Ranger, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard

name: Inspiring Speech
desc: The componente verbal of this spell is a 10-minuto-long, rousing speech. no final de the speech, all your aliados within the affected area who heard the speech gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls and vantagem on teste de resistências for 1 hora against effects that cause the enfeitiçado or amedrontado condition. Additionally, each recipient gains temporary pontos de vida equal to your spellcasting ability modifier. If you move farther than 1 milha from your aliados or you die, this spell ends. A character can be affected by only one casting of this spell at a time; subsequent, overlapping castings have no additional effect and don't extend the spell's duration.

name: Instant Armored Vehicle
desc:
You transform a handful of materials into a Huge armored vehicle. The vehicle can take whatever form you want, but it has AC 18 and 100 pontos de vida. If it is reduced to 0 pontos de vida, it is destroyed. If it is a ground vehicle, it has a Deslocamento of 90 pés. If it is an airborne vehicle, it has a voando Deslocamento of 45 pés. If it is a waterborne vehicle, it has a Deslocamento of 2 milhas per hora. The vehicle can hold up to four Medium criaturas within it.
  A criatura inside it has three-quarters cover from attacks outside the vehicle, which contains arrow slits, portholes, and other small openings. A criatura piloting the armored vehicle can take the Careen action. To do so, the vehicle must move at least 10 pés in a straight line and enter or pass through the space of at least one Large or smaller criatura. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks. cada criatura in the armored vehicle's path deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza against your CD de resistência à magia. em uma falha no teste, the criatura recebe 5d8 dano contundente and is knocked prostrado. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura can choose to be pushed 5 pés away from the space through which the vehicle passed. A criatura that chooses not to be pushed suffers the consequences of a failed teste de resistência. If the criatura piloting the armored vehicle isn't proficiente in land, water, or air vehicles (whichever is appropriate for the vehicle's type), each alvo has vantagem on the teste de resistência against the Careen action.

name: Instant Fortification
desc:
Through this spell, you transform a miniature statuette of a keep into an actual fort. The fortification springs from the ground in an unoccupied space within range. It is a 10- pé cube (including floor and roof).

Each wall has two arrow slits. One wall also includes a metal door with an [arcane lock](https://api.open5e.com/spells/arcane-lock) effect on it. You designate at the time of the fort’s creation which criaturas can ignore the lock and enter the fortification. The door has AC 20 and 60 pontos de vida, and it can be broken open with a successful CD 25 Força (Atletismo) check. The walls are made of stone (AC 15) and are immune to necrótico, veneno, and dano psíquico. Each 5-pé-square section of wall has 90 pontos de vida. Reducing a section of wall to 0 pontos de vida destroys it, allowing access to the inside of the fortification.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level or higher, you can increase the length or width of the fortification by 5 pés for each slot level above 5th. You can make a different choice (width or length) for each slot level above 5th.
material: a statuette of a keep worth 250 gp, which is consumed in the casting

name: Instant Siege Weapon
desc:
With this spell, you instantly transform raw materials into a siege engine of Large size or smaller (the GM has information on this topic). The raw materials for the spell don’t need to be the actual components a siege weapon is normally built from; they just need to be manufactured goods made of the appropriate substances (typically including some form of finished wood and a few bits of worked metal) and have a gold piece value of no less than the weapon’s pontos de vida.

For example, a mangonel has 100 pontos de vida. **Instant siege weapon** will fashion any collection of raw materials worth at least 100 gp into a mangonel. Those materials might be lumber and fittings salvaged from a small house, or 100 gp worth of finished goods such as three wagons or two pesada crossbows. The spell also creates enough munição for ten shots, if the siege engine uses munição.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 6th level, a Huge siege engine can be made; at 8th level, a Gargantuan siege engine can be made. In addition, for each slot level above 4th, the spell creates another ten shots’ worth of munição.
material: raw materials with a value in gp equal to the pontos de vida of the siege weapon to be created

name: Instant Snare
desc:
You create a snare on a point you can see within range. You can leave the snare as a mágico trap, or you can use your reação to trigger the trap when a Large or smaller criatura you can see moves within 10 pés of the snare. If you leave the snare as a trap, a criatura deve ter sucesso em an Inteligência (Investigação) or Sabedoria (Percepção) check against your CD de resistência à magia to find the trap.
  When a Large or smaller criatura moves within 5 pés of the snare, the trap triggers. The criatura deve ter sucesso em a teste de resistência de Destreza ou ficar magically pulled into the air. The criatura is imobilizado and hangs upside down 5 pés above the snare's location for 1 minuto. A imobilizado criatura can repeat the teste de resistência no final de cada um de seus turnos, escaping the snare em um sucesso. Alternatively, a criatura, including the imobilizado alvo, can use its action to make an Inteligência (Arcanismo) check against your CD de resistência à magia. em um sucesso, the imobilizado criatura is freed, and the snare resets itself 1 minuto later. If the criatura succeeds on the check by 5 or more, the snare is destroyed instead.
  This spell alerts you with a ping in your mind when the trap is triggered if you are within 1 milha of the snare. This ping awakens you if you are sleeping.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 3rd level or higher, you can create one additional snare for each slot level above 3rd. When you receive the mental ping that a trap was triggered, you know which snare was triggered if you have more than one.
material: a loop of twine

name: Instant Summons
desc: Você toca um objeto com peso igual ou inferior a 4,5 kg cuja maior dimensão seja igual ou inferior a 1,8 metro. A magia deixa uma marca invisível em sua superfície e inscreve invisivelmente o nome do item na safira que você usa como componente material. Cada vez que você conjura esta magia, deve usar uma safira diferente. A qualquer momento após isso, você pode usar sua ação para pronunciar o nome do item e esmagar a safira. O item aparece instantaneamente em sua mão, independentemente das distâncias físicas ou planares, e a magia termina. Se outra criatura estiver segurando ou carregando o item, esmagar a safira não transporta o item até você, mas em vez disso você descobre quem é a criatura que possui o objeto e onde ela está localizada aproximadamente naquele momento. Dispel Magic ou um efeito semelhante aplicado com sucesso à safira encerra o efeito desta magia.
material: Uma safira no valor de 1.000 po.

name: Instant Summons
desc:
Until the spell ends, a mystical bond connects the alvo and the precious stone used to cast this spell.

Any time after, you may crush the stone and speak the name of the item, summoning it instantly into your hand no matter the physical, metaphysical, or planar distances involved, at which point the spell ends. If another criatura is holding the item when the stone is crushed, the item is not summoned to you. Instead, the spell grants you the knowledge of who possesses it and a general idea of the criatura's location.

Each time you cast this spell, you must use a different precious stone.

Dispel magic or a similar effect alvoing the stone ends the spell.

name: Invested Champion
desc:
You touch uma criatura and choose either to become its champion, or for it to become yours. If you choose a criatura to become your champion, it fights on your behalf. While this spell is in effect, you can cast any spell with a range of touch on your champion as if the spell had a range of 60 pés. Your champion's attacks are considered mágico, and you can use a ação bônus on your turn to encourage your champion, granting it vantagem on its next jogada de ataque.
  If you become the champion of another criatura, you gain vantagem on all attack rolls against criaturas that have attacked your charge within the last rodada. If you are wielding a shield, and a criatura within 5 pés of you attacks your charge, you can use your reação to impose desvantagem on the jogada de ataque, as if you had the Protection fighting style. If you already have the Protection fighting style, then in addition to imposing desvantagem, you can also push an inimigo 5 pés in any direction away from your charge when you take your reação. You can use a ação bônus on your turn to reroll o dano for any successful attack against a criatura that is threatening your charge.
  Whichever version of the spell is cast, if the distance between the champion and its designated aliado increases to more than 60 pés, the spell ends.

name: Invigorated Strikes
desc: You allow long-forgotten fighting instincts to boil up to the surface. For the duration of the spell, whenever the alvo causa damage with an unarmed strike or natural weapon, it causa 1d4 extra damage.
higher_level:
When you cast this spell with a 3rd-level espaço de magia, the extra damage increases from 1d4 to 1d6\. When you cast this spell with a 5th-level espaço de magia, the extra damage increases to 1d8.

When you cast this spell with a 7th-level espaço de magia, the extra damage increases to 1d10.

name: Invisibility
desc: Uma criatura que você toca torna-se invisível até o fim da magia. Qualquer coisa que o alvo esteja vestindo ou carregando também fica invisível, desde que esteja sobre o alvo. A magia termina para um alvo que realizar um ataque ou lançar uma magia.
higher_level: Quando você lança essa magia usando um espaço de magia de 3º nível ou superior, você pode ter como alvo uma criatura adicional para cada nível de espaço acima do 2º.
material: Um cílio envolto em goma arábica.

name: Invisibility
desc: You wreathe a criatura in an illusory veil, making it invisível. Anything the alvo is carrying or wearing is also invisível as long as it remains in the alvo's possession. The spell's effects end for a alvo that attacks or casts a spell.
higher_level: alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Ire of the Mountain
desc: An **ire of the mountain** spell melts não mágico objects that are made primarily of metal. Choose one metal object weighing 10 pounds or less that you can see within range. Tendrils of blistering air writhe toward the alvo. A criatura holding or wearing the item deve fazer a teste de resistência de Destreza. em um sucesso no teste, the criatura recebe 1d8 dano de fogo and the spell has no further effect. em uma falha no teste, the alvoed object melts and is destroyed, and the criatura recebe 4d8 dano de fogo if it is wearing the object, or 2d8 dano de fogo if it is holding the object. If the object is not being held or worn by a criatura, it is automatically melted and rendered useless. This spell cannot affect magic items.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can alvo one additional object for each slot level above 3rd.
material: a piece of coal

name: Iron Gut
desc:
For the duration, one willing criatura you touch has resistance to dano de veneno and vantagem on teste de resistências against veneno. When the affected criatura makes a teste de resistência de Constituição against an effect that causa dano de veneno or that would cause the criatura to become envenenado, the criatura can choose to succeed on the teste de resistência. If it does so, the spell ends on the criatura.
  While affected by this spell, a criatura can't gain any benefit from consuming mágico foodstuffs, such as those produced by the goodberry and heroes' feast spells, and it doesn't suffer ill effects from consuming potentially harmful, não mágico foodstuffs, such as spoiled food or non-potable water. The criatura is affected normally by other consumable magic items, such as potions. The criatura can identify envenenado food by a sour taste, with deadlier poisons tasting more sour.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, you can alvo one additional criatura for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Iron Hand
desc: **Iron hand** is a Comum spell among metalsmiths and other crafters who work with heat. When you use this spell, one of your arms becomes immune to dano de fogo, allowing you to grasp red-hot metal, scoop up molten glass with your fingers, or alcance deep into a roaring fogo to pick up an object. In addition, if you take the Dodge action while you’re protected by **iron hand**, you have resistance to dano de fogo until the start of your next turn.

name: Irresistible Dance
desc: Escolha uma criatura que você possa ver dentro do alcance. O alvo começa uma dança cômica no lugar: embaralhando os pés, batendo-os no chão e saltitando pela duração. Criaturas que não podem ser enfeitiçadas são imunes a essa magia. Uma criatura dançando deve usar todo o seu deslocamento para dançar sem sair do seu espaço e tem desvantagem em testes de resistência de Destreza e em jogadas de ataque. Enquanto o alvo estiver sob o efeito dessa magia, outras criaturas têm vantagem em jogadas de ataque contra ele. Como uma ação, uma criatura dançando realiza um teste de resistência de Sabedoria para recuperar o controle de si mesma. Em um teste bem-sucedido, a magia termina.

name: Irresistible Dance
desc: You murmur a tune that recebe root in the alvo's mind until the spell ends, forcing it to caper, dance, and shuffle. no início de cada um de seus turnos, the dancing alvo must use all of its movement to dance in its space, and it has desvantagem on attack rolls and teste de resistências. Attacks made against the alvo have vantagem. On cada um de seus turnos, the alvo can use an action to repeat the teste de resistência, ending the spell em um sucesso no teste.
higher_level: alvo one additional criatura within 30 pés for each slot level above 6th.

name: Jagged Forcelance
desc:
You create a mágico tether of pulsing, golden força between two willing criaturas you can see within range. The two criaturas must be within 15 pés of each other. The tether remains as long as each tethered criatura ends its turn within 15 pés of the other tethered criatura. If a tethered criatura ends its turn more than 15 pés away from its tethered partner, the spell ends. Though the tether appears as a thin line, its effect extends the full height of the tethered criaturas and can affect prostrado or hovering criaturas, provided the hovering criatura hovers no higher than the tallest tethered criatura.
  Any criatura that touches the tether or ends its turn in a space the tether passes through deve fazer a teste de resistência de Força. em uma falha, a criatura recebe 3d6 dano de força and is knocked prostrado. em um sucesso, a criatura recebe half as much damage and isn't knocked prostrado. A criatura that makes this teste de resistência, whether it succeeds or fails, can't be affected by the tether again until the start of your next turn.
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a espaço de magia of 4th level or higher, the maximum distance between the tethered criaturas increases by 5 pés, and o dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Jarring Growl
desc: You loose a growl from deep within the pit of your stomach, causing others who can hear it to become unnerved. You have vantagem on Carisma (Intimidação) checks you make before the beginning of your next turn. In addition, cada criatura within 5 pés of you deve fazer a teste de resistência de Sabedoria. em uma falha, you have vantagem on attack rolls against that criatura until the end of your turn. You are aware of which criaturas failed their teste de resistências.

name: Jeweled Fissure
desc: Deep Magic: dragon With a sweeping gesture, you cause jagged crystals to burst from the ground and hurtle directly upward. Choose an origin point within the spell's range that you can see. Starting from that point, the crystals burst out of the ground along a 30-pé line. todas as criaturas in that line and up to 100 pés above it take 2d8 dano de trovão plus 2d8 dano perfurante; a successful teste de resistência de Destreza negates the dano perfurante. A criatura that fails the teste de resistência is impaled by a chunk of crystal that halves the criatura's Deslocamento, prevents it from voando, and causes it to fall to the ground if it was voando.
